title: Cutting Corners
relevance_summary: Access control bug in staking contract leading to unauthorized access and funds theft

prevention.rule: Block any tx that modifies staking contract state without proper authorization checks
prevention.trigger: STAKING_CONTRACT -> function without proper authorization check in single tx

monitoring_rules: Monitor for unauthorized staking contract modifications
summary: SuperRare's staking contract contained a basic access control bug that allowed attackers to steal funds. A guard could have blocked such transactions by monitoring for unauthorized contract state changes.
